Table	Create Table
posts	CREATE TABLE `posts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `accountId` int NOT NULL,
  `caption` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','pending','approved','scheduled','published','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `theme` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `scheduledAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `publishedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `instagramPostId` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `instagramPermalink` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `likes` int DEFAULT '0',
  `comments` int DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `mcpPending` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `retryCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `nextRetryAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=360001
